data_coverage_summary: Qualio GraphQL / Developer API has public documentation that indicates quality and compliance workflows across quality events, deviations, documents, inspections. Public GraphQL reference and Developer API help content are available.
buyer_guidance: Use this API family for QMS, compliance, and inspection-process integration. It is a workflow and record surface, not an asset or telemetry feed. Qualio should be treated as a graphql api surface for quality and compliance workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Qualio GraphQL / Developer API indicates Public GraphQL reference and Developer API help content are available. The documented surface aligns with quality and compliance workflows and covers quality events, deviations, documents, inspections. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates quality-management and compliance workflows centered on controlled records, inspections, and approvals rather than machine telemetry.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Qualio GraphQL / Developer API is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as quality and compliance workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Public GraphQL reference and Developer API help content are available.
